project.description: Upload HPDS template files (.tftpl) to S3 for use by the Render HPDS Config Templates job.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: TARGET_STACK
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Target stack identifier (e.g., a, b). Leave empty to upload to the shared template path.

hudson.model.FileParameterDefinition.name: hpds-auth.env.tftpl
hudson.model.FileParameterDefinition.description: Upload an auth HPDS template file. This template is rendered with environment-specific values during deployment.

hudson.model.FileParameterDefinition.name: hpds-open.env.tftpl
hudson.model.FileParameterDefinition.description: Upload an open HPDS template file. This template is rendered with environment-specific values during deployment.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash
set -e # Source folder containing the scripts source_scripts_folder="${JENKINS_HOME}/workspace/Bash_Functions/"
# Iterate through the files in the folder and source them for script_file in "$source_scripts_folder"*.sh; do chmod +x "$script_file" if [ -f "$script_file" ] && [ -x "$script_file" ]; then echo "sourcing $script_file" source "$script_file" fi done
# Determine S3 prefix based on TARGET_STACK if [ -n "${TARGET_STACK}" ]; then S3_PREFIX="configs/hpds/templates/${TARGET_STACK}" echo "Uploading to stack-specific path: ${S3_PREFIX}/" else S3_PREFIX="configs/hpds/templates" echo "Uploading to shared path: ${S3_PREFIX}/" fi
# Upload the HPDS template files to S3 if [ -f hpds-auth.env.tftpl ]; then aws s3 --sse=AES256 cp hpds-auth.env.tftpl "s3://$stack_s3_bucket/${S3_PREFIX}/hpds-auth.env.tftpl" echo "Uploaded hpds-auth.env.tftpl" else echo "No hpds-auth.env.tftpl file provided, skipping." fi
if [ -f hpds-open.env.tftpl ]; then aws s3 --sse=AES256 cp hpds-open.env.tftpl "s3://$stack_s3_bucket/${S3_PREFIX}/hpds-open.env.tftpl" echo "Uploaded hpds-open.env.tftpl" else echo "No hpds-open.env.tftpl file provided, skipping." fi
